/CAL:BEHAVIOR COURT DISPO/MO PC 17B/MO GRTD/X:COUNT ONE 273A(A)PC IS REDUCED FROM FELONY TO MISDEMEANOR/X:PEOPLE'S ORAL MOTION TO ADD COUNT 3 (242PC, A MISDEMEANOR) IS GRANTED/FAWA/IRRC/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST &CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF G/DEFT ADV RTS:1 AND 3/ARBUCKLE/REMA/FNDG/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/DISPO/X:ISS; PROB 3 Y; CTSCOHOL; VF $300/RESTV/X:DNACOMP; PROBREVFN; COA $40; ICNA; FINE/X:SUCCESSFUL COMPLETION OF BHC /X:WAIVER OF CREDITS UP TO SENTENCE FOR ALL MBHC PURPOSES ONLY/SA1:150 YARDS FROM ROSELMIE K, AND AURISELMA ORZO/X:STAY AWAY ORDER TO BE FILED AT SENTENCE/X:NO NEW ARRESTS OR SAO VIOLATIONS, IF DEFENDANT IS ARRESTED ON NEW CHARGES ORSAO VIOLATIONS, DEF, WILL BE IN VIOLATIONOFPROBATION AND REMANDED INTO CUSTODY TO  AWAIT A NEW PLACEMENT OR TREATMENTPLAN/X:IF DEF, IS PLACED IN A  RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT PROGRAMOR SUPPORTIVEHOUSING AND LEAVES WITHOUT AUTHORIZATION OR IS TERMINATED, DEF,WILL BE IN VIOLATION OF PROBATION AND REMANDED INTO CUSTODY TO AWAIT A NEW PLACEMENT ORTREATMENT PLAN/DEF:ADHERENCE TO THE APD AND BHC INDIVIDUALIZED TREATMENTPLAN WHICH WILL INCLUDE, BASED UPON THE FACTS OF THIS CASE AND DEF'S HISTORY, ANY MEDICATION RECOMMENDED BY A LICENSED PHYSICIAN WORKING WITH THE BHC,AS WELL AS MENTAL HEALTH AND OR DRUG TREATMENT /X:IF THE DEFENDANT IS PLACED IN A RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT PROGRAM AND LEAVESWITHOUT AUTHORIZATION OR IS TERMINATED, THEY WILL BE IN VIOLATION OF THE BHC PROGRAM,/X: NO EARLY TERMINATION OF PROBATION WITHOUT AGREEMENT OF THE BHC PROGRAM,/ /X:THERE WILLBE NO REDUCTION OF THESE CHARGES AT ANY TIME WITHOUT AGREEMENT OF THE ENTIRE BHC TEAM/X:IF DEF FAILS TO BEGIN HER MBHC OR REFUSED TO PARTICIPATE INMHC AT ANY POINT AFTER AGREEING TO MBHC, SHE WILL BE SENTECED TO 1 YEAR CJAND CTS/X:IFDEF BEGINS BUT FAILS TO COMPLETE MBHC, SHE WILL BE SENTENCED TO6MONTHS COUNTY JAIL WITH CTS/TWS/
